texto: My takeaway from all of Ophelia's sessions was that life favored value. The world was bursting with opportunity. If you didn't like who you were, it was time to reinvent yourself and try again. It was a disservice to the universe to cheat everyone of your talents. And if you were at your wit's end, thinking you had nothing to offer, it was essential to cultivate value within yourself in order to move forward. In order to live beyond existence. In order to turn your pain into something beautiful.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Fran Seen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “My takeaway from all of Ophelia's sessions was that life favored value. The world was bursting wi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beauty, existence pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e existence.
